description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events, excluding documentation and markdown files. The workflow should have four jobs: lint code, unit tests, aggregate coverage calculations, and automatically merge Dependabot pull requests. The lint job checks code style and compiles TypeScript definitions on ubuntu-latest. The unit tests job runs on a matrix of Node.js versions and operating systems, installing dependencies and running tests. The coverage job aggregates coverage calculations after unit tests finish. The automerge job merges Dependabot pull requests if lint and unit tests pass.
